---
title: Functions and Relations
description: Discrete mappings and pair relationships.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Distinguish relations from functions.
- Interpret ordered pairs.
- Recognize when each input has one output.
:::

A relation is a set of ordered pairs. A function is a relation where each input
has exactly one output.

::: {.practice-box}
1. Is `{(1, 2), (1, 3)}` a function?
2. Is `{(1, 2), (2, 3)}` a function?
3. Why does the function rule matter?
:::
